source_yaml:
title: forest_encounter_01
description: A conversation between two travelers meeting in a forest.
lines:
- slot: 1
  text: संस्कृत ॰ नमो नमः मित्र, भवान् कुत्र गच्छति?
  expression: 'grammar_point: Focus on the root ''गम'' (gam) for movement.; cultural_context:
    The use of ''नमो नमः'' as a standard respectful greeting.'
  segment_id: 1
  layers:
    facial_expression: Smiling, friendly eye contact
    audio_layer:
      bgm: Soft forest birds and wind
      voice_tone: Welcoming, rising intonation for the question
      sanskrit_emphasis: Focus on the 'visarga' in 'namah'
    visual_layer:
      background: Dense foliage with stylized trees
      character_action: Raising right hand in a greeting gesture
  grammar_notes:
    grammar_point: Focus on the root 'गम' (gam) for movement.
    cultural_context: The use of 'नमो नमः' as a standard respectful greeting.
- slot: 2
  text: हिंदी ॰ नमस्ते मित्र, आप कहाँ जा रहे हैं?
  segment_id: 1
- slot: 3
  text: संस्कृत ॰ अहं ग्रामं प्रति गच्छामि।
  expression: 'derivation_analysis: {''word'': ''गच्छामि'', ''root'': ''गम्'', ''analysis'':
    ''Present tense, corresponding to the speaker (I)''}'
  segment_id: 2
  layers:
    facial_expression: Neutral, informative
    audio_layer:
      bgm: Slightly louder rustling of leaves
      voice_tone: Steady, declarative
    visual_layer:
      background: A path winding through the trees
      character_action: Pointing toward the horizon
  grammar_notes:
    derivation_analysis:
      word: गच्छामि
      root: गम्
      analysis: Present tense, corresponding to the speaker (I)
- slot: 4
  text: हिंदी ॰ मैं ग्राम की ओर जा रहा हूँ।
  segment_id: 2
- slot: 5
  text: संस्कृत ॰ किं भवान् मया सह चलिष्यति?
  expression: 'usage: Future tense construction using ''चलिष्यति''.'
  segment_id: 3
  layers:
    facial_expression: Inquisitive, hopeful
    audio_layer:
      voice_tone: Inviting, melodic
    visual_layer:
      accent_elements: Border patterns reminiscent of geometric folk motifs
  grammar_notes:
    usage: Future tense construction using 'चलिष्यति'.
- slot: 6
  text: हिंदी ॰ क्या आप मेरे साथ चलेंगे?
  segment_id: 3
- slot: 7
  text: संस्कृत ॰ आम्, अहं भवतः सह चलामि।
  expression: 'grammar_point: Use of ''आम्'' for affirmation and ''चलामि'' as a first-person
    singular future tense verb.'
  segment_id: 4
  layers:
    facial_expression: Happy, relieved
    audio_layer:
      voice_tone: Affirmative, warm
    visual_layer:
      character_action: Nodding and starting to walk alongside the other character
  grammar_notes:
    grammar_point: Use of 'आम्' for affirmation and 'चलामि' as a first-person singular
      future tense verb.
- slot: 8
  text: हिंदी ॰ हाँ, मैं आपके साथ चलूँगा।
  segment_id: 4
- slot: 9
  text: संस्कृत ॰ मम नाम अर्जुन अस्ति। भवतः नाम किम्?
  expression: 'grammar_point: Introduction using ''मम नाम ... अस्ति'' and asking for
    the other person''s name with ''किम्?''.'
  segment_id: 5
  layers:
    facial_expression: Curious, friendly
    audio_layer:
      voice_tone: Inquisitive, engaging
    visual_layer:
      character_action: Extending hand for a handshake
  grammar_notes:
    grammar_point: Introduction using 'मम नाम ... अस्ति' and asking for the other
      person's name with 'किम्?'.
- slot: 10
  text: हिंदी ॰ मेरा नाम अर्जुन है। आपका नाम क्या है?
  segment_id: 5
- slot: 11
  text: संस्कृत ॰ मम नाम श्रीधर अस्ति।
  expression: 'grammar_point: Introduction using ''मम नाम ... अस्ति'' for stating
    one''s own name.'
  segment_id: 6
  layers:
    facial_expression: Pleased, confident
    audio_layer:
      voice_tone: Calm, assertive
    visual_layer:
      character_action: Smiling and nodding
  grammar_notes:
    grammar_point: Introduction using 'मम नाम ... अस्ति' for stating one's own name.
- slot: 12
  text: हिंदी ॰ मेरा नाम श्रीधर है।
  segment_id: 6
- slot: 13
  text: संस्कृत ॰ भवान् कुत्रतः आगतः?
  expression: 'grammar_point: Asking about origin using ''कुत्रतः आगतः?''.'
  segment_id: 7
  layers:
    facial_expression: Inquisitive, interested
    audio_layer:
      voice_tone: Curious, engaging
    visual_layer:
      character_action: Tilting head slightly, maintaining eye contact
  grammar_notes:
    grammar_point: Asking about origin using 'कुत्रतः आगतः?'.
- slot: 14
  text: हिंदी ॰ आप कहाँ से आए हैं?
  segment_id: 7
- slot: 15
  text: संस्कृत ॰ अहं हिमालयसमीपग्रामात् आगतः अस्मि। यात्रायां वनेषु अनेकान् पशून्
    दृष्टवान् अस्मि।
  expression: 'grammar_point: Past experience using perfect participle ''दृष्टवान्
    अस्मि'' to indicate ''have seen''.'
  segment_id: 8
  layers:
    facial_expression: Reflective, experienced
    audio_layer:
      bgm: Soft forest birds and wind
      voice_tone: Calm, storytelling
    visual_layer:
      background: A path winding through the trees
      character_action: Walking and gesturing towards the distant path
  grammar_notes:
    grammar_point: Past experience using perfect participle 'दृष्टवान् अस्मि' to indicate
      'have seen'.
- slot: 16
  text: हिंदी ॰ मैं हिमालय के निकट एक गांव से आया हूँ। यात्रा के दौरान जंगलों में
    अनेक जानवरों को देखा है।
  segment_id: 8
- slot: 17
  text: संस्कृत ॰ सुन्दरम्! भवान् वन्यपशूनां सम्यक् अनुभवं प्राप्तवान् अस्ति। तेषां
    विषये भवतः ज्ञानं किम् अस्ति? किं ते आचरणे अनुमेयाः भवन्ति उत अप्रत्याशिताः?
  expression: 'grammar_point: Question formation with ''किम् अस्ति'' and ''उत'' for
    presenting alternatives (''or'').'
  segment_id: 9
  layers:
    facial_expression: Interested, engaged
    audio_layer:
      bgm: Slightly louder rustling of leaves
      voice_tone: Curious, rising intonation
    visual_layer:
      character_action: Looking at the companion while walking side by side
  grammar_notes:
    grammar_point: Question formation with 'किम् अस्ति' and 'उत' for presenting alternatives
      ('or').
- slot: 18
  text: हिंदी ॰ बढ़िया! तो आपने जंगली जानवरों का अच्छा अनुभव प्राप्त किया है। उनके
    बारे में आपका ज्ञान क्या है? क्या वे व्यवहार में अनुमानित होते हैं या अप्रत्याशित?
  segment_id: 9
- slot: 19
  text: संस्कृत ॰ मम ज्ञानानुसारम्, केचित् पशवः यथा पक्षिणः अति अनुमेयाः सन्ति यतः
    ते प्रतिदिनम् एकस्मिन् एव काले उड्डयन्ते। किन्तु केचित् यथा सिंहः वा व्याघ्रः
    अप्रत्याशिताः भवितुम् अर्हन्ति, ते कदाचित् अकस्मात् प्रकटाः भवन्ति।
  expression: 'grammar_point: Comparative structure using ''केचित् ... किन्तु केचित्''
    to contrast predictable and unpredictable behaviors.'
  segment_id: 10
  layers:
    facial_expression: Knowledgeable, explanatory
    audio_layer:
      bgm: Soft animal sounds in the distance
      voice_tone: Informative, steady
    visual_layer:
      background: Dense foliage with stylized trees
      character_action: Pointing towards the bushes as if indicating hidden animals
  grammar_notes:
    grammar_point: Comparative structure using 'केचित् ... किन्तु केचित्' to contrast
      predictable and unpredictable behaviors.
- slot: 20
  text: हिंदी ॰ मेरे ज्ञान के अनुसार, कुछ जानवर जैसे पक्षी बहुत अनुमानित होते हैं
    क्योंकि वे रोज एक ही समय पर उड़ते हैं। लेकिन कुछ जैसे शेर या बाघ अप्रत्याशित हो
    सकते हैं, वे कभी भी अचानक प्रकट हो सकते हैं।
  segment_id: 10
scene_metadata:
  scene_id: forest_encounter_01
  context: A conversation between two travelers meeting in a forest.
  art_style: Traditional regional folk art with vibrant line work
  medium_of_instruction: हिंदी
  target_language: संस्कृत
  grammar_rules:
    prathama_purusha: I
    uttama_purusha: III
title: forest_encounter_01
description: A conversation between two travelers meeting in a forest.
lines:
  - slot: 1
    text: 'संस्कृत ॰ '
title: forest_encounter_01
description: A conversation between two travelers meeting in a forest.
